description:
Specification:

Product Name: Pet Bowl

Material: PP

Drinking Bowl Capacity: 690ml

Size:

Water feeder: 29.5 x 14 x 18cm

Feeding bowl: 29.5 x 18 x 10.5cm

Feature:

[Multi-purpose Cat Food Bowl] The food bowl can be disassembled into 2 pack cat feeders (a raised cat food bowl and a cat slow feeder bowl), and there is a can slot to fix the can, helping cat to have a balanced diet and to control its diet scientifically.

[Automatic Cat Water Dispenser] With the siphon principle, this cat water dispenser can stably control the water output speed, allowing cats to drink fresh water. The 690ml water drinking bowl can meet the pet's daily water intake.

[Cute Avocado Shape] Our avocado shaped pet bowl is cute and fun, helping to increase your pet's appetite. There are two optional styles, each with three optional colors to meet your needs.

[Large Diameter Pet Bowl] The diameter of the cat food bowl is 5.31in, which is suitable for cats of all face shapes. With a design of low front and high back, this cat bowl is comfortable and convenient for cats to eat food or drink water.

Notes:

1.There may be slight differences between the picture and the actual color of the commodity. We will try our best to show you the exact color.

2.Please allow slight dimension difference due to manual measurement.
